Infinite Tea Menu

All tea is made fresh to order with choice of fresh brewed tea, lemonade, sweeteners, fresh cooked tapioca boba or bursting boba, real freeze-dried fruit pieces and fruit powders, Ghirardelli syrup, dairy, or nondairy creamer and optional whipped cream topper.

29 drinks

vanilla black tea, brown sugar, cream with sprinkles
